entities.name: ALBIZIA PROCERA
entities.description: A multipurpose tree species used in agroforestry systems.

entities.name: HARDWICKIA BINATA
entities.description: A multipurpose tree species used in agroforestry systems.

entities.name: EMBLICA OFFICINALIS
entities.description: A multipurpose tree species used in agroforestry systems.

entities.name: AGROFORESTRY
entities.description: The integration of trees and shrubs into crop and animal farming systems.

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A measure of the carbon stored in soil organic matter.

entities.name: DEHYDROGENASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: An enzyme activity used as an indicator of soil microbial activity.

entities.name: MICROBIAL BIOMASS CARBON
entities.description: The carbon contained within the living microbial biomass of the soil.

entities.name: POTENTIALLY MINERALIZABLE NITROGEN
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen in the soil that can be converted to inorganic forms.

entities.name: SOIL BIOLOGICAL PROPERTIES
entities.description: The collective biological characteristics and activities of the soil.

entities.name: CROWN PRUNING MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of removing branches from the crown of a tree to manage growth and soil impact.

entities.name: TREE DENSITY MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of adjusting the number of trees planted per hectare.

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE CONSERVATION
entities.description: Measures such as stone mulch and deep basin used to maintain soil moisture.

entities.name: RHIZOSPHERE
entities.description: The soil zone immediately surrounding the roots of a plant.

entities.name: NON-RHIZOSPHERE ZONE
entities.description: The soil zone outside the tree canopy.

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: The semi-arid region where the agroforestry study was conducted.
